publishedAbstract: - Red Hat OpenShift Container Storage installs only one (1) `ceph-mgr` Pod by default.- From my general experience with "Ceph", the number of `ceph-mgr` processes should be at least three (3) to not have a single point of failure and to have "standby" `ceph-mgr` processes running.- How to properly add additional `ceph-mgr` Pods in Red Hat OpenShift Container Storage?
publishedTitle: Why are no ceph-mgr standby instances running in an OpenShift Container Storage 4.x cluster?
